chunks.text: Furrow Markets is global agricultural market intelligence by Nexus Group. Launch summer 2026. Bloomberg-grade analysis at roughly 1/10 the price of Reuters/Bloomberg. AI-drafted, human-edited. English and Russian.

Planned tiers: Free ($0) — last 7 days of Daily Briefs, weekly newsletter, limited archive. Pro ($39/mo) — full archive, daily digest, weekly deep dives, no ads. Premium ($149/mo) — monthly outlooks, custom price alerts, AI Q&A, PDF export. Enterprise ($499+) — API, custom reports, white-label.

Markets: grains, oilseeds, livestock, dairy, softs (coffee, sugar, cocoa), fertilizer. Regions: Black Sea (Russia, Ukraine, Kazakhstan), EU, Americas, Asia, MENA. Sources: USDA, FAO, EU Agri-Markets, APK-Inform, SovEcon, Zerno Online, CBOT delayed quotes, trade press RSS.
Furrow content is for information only — not investment advice, trading recommendations, or solicitation. Verify prices with official sources before business decisions.

Early access waitlist: founding subscribers get locked-in pricing. Subscribe on the homepage form or ask the agent to submit_waitlist with name, email, and interest (grains, livestock, dairy, softs, fertilizer, all).
Demo homepage shows sample wheat analysis (Black Sea export tax, CBOT levels). Full product will publish Daily Briefs, weekly deep dives, and monthly outlooks after launch.

Pre-launch site offers delayed CBOT corn/wheat/soy and Baltic Dry via get_market_signals (Yahoo Finance, unofficial, ~15 min cache). Always disclaimer: not investment advice. Ticker on homepage updates from same API when deployed on Vercel or npm run dev.
